mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_account_info ( user_id, available_points, total_earned_points, total_consumed_points, last_settlement_time, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{availablePoints}, #{totalEarnedPoints}, #{totalConsumedPoints}, #{lastSettlementTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: UPDATE point_account_info SET available_points = #{availablePoints}, total_earned_points = #{totalEarnedPoints}, total_consumed_points = #{totalConsumedPoints}, last_settlement_time = #{lastSettlementTime}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted} WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT account_id, user_id, available_points, total_earned_points, total_consumed_points, last_settlement_time, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM point_account_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
